types.defaultRemarksHint: Optional: duration, follow-up advice, any special instructions.

types.displayName: Fitness Certificate (Fit to Join / Fit for Duty)

types.notes: Some jurisdictions require specific government formats; use as a general note unless a mandated form is required.

types.displayName: Travel Fitness Certificate (Fit to Fly / Travel)

types.defaultRemarksHint: Example: Vaccine name, dose number, route, site, batch/lot (if available), next due date.

types.notes: Insurance providers may require specific forms; use this as a supporting note unless a mandated format is provided.
For medico-legal cases, local hospital/authority protocols and MLC formats may apply.
